title: supplementary files
author: Tan, Lina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
1."Supplementary Figure 1.tif" – 
 Electrocardiogram (ECG) from animal cardiac ischemia-reperfusion model 
 Evans blue/TTC staining 
 Echocardiography 
 India ink microvascular perfusion staining 
 2."Supplementary Figure 2.tif" – 
 PCA plot showing separation between IR (red) and Sham (blue) groups 
 Volcano plot of transcriptome-wide expression differences. Red points represent significantly differentially expressed genes. 
 Heatmap of the top 50 DEGs between IR and Sham groups. Red and blue indicate high and low expression, respectively 
 Venn diagram illustrating the overlap between DEGs and autophagy-related genes, identifying 7 common genes (Casp8, Trp53inp2, Edem1, Casp4, Myc, Eif2ak2, Ulk1) 
 3."Supplementary Figure 3.tif" – 
 GO analysis of biological process (BP), cellular component (CC), and molecular function (MF) for distinct I/R subgroups. 
 Representative Kyoto Encylopedia of Genes and Genomes (KEGG) pathway analysis for potential pathways. 
 4."Supplementary Figure 4.tif" – 
 Immunohistochemical staining of c-Myc and Caspase 4 in microvascular injury after myocardial I/R. 
 5."Supplementary Figure 5.tif" – 
 Changes in mRNA expression levels of the 4 hub biomarkers in the H/R model. 
 Representative immunoblots and quantitative densitometric analysis of c-Myc, Cdkn1a and Caspase 4 in H/R model. 
 6."Supplementary Figure 6.tif" – 
 Transmission electron microscopy (TEM) images showing cellular ultrastructure. 
 7.`Supplementary Table S1.docx` -Specific information of datasets. 
 8. `Supplementary Table S2.docx` -This table contains the qPCR primer sequences presented in the manuscript. 
 9. `Supplementary Table S3.docx` -This table contains the validation of key gene expression in the dataset GSE160516. 
 10. `Supplementary Table S4.docx` -This table contains power analysis of endpoint assays in myocardial I/R model. 
 11. `Supplementary Table S5.docx` -This table contains the a ssessment of parametric test assumptions and selection of statistical methods for genes expression and TUNEL fluorescence intensity analysis . 
 12. `Supplementary Table S6.docx` -This table contains  the comparison of four cardiac and functional parameters between sham and I/R groups  .
